acceptanceCriteria.text: User sees daily quests and weekly challenge with progress
Daily and weekly credit earning caps are enforced
Admin can change reward values without redeploying

snapshot.description: XP for broad learning activity. Credits earnable from low-cost validated actions (Reading, Listening, report review, drills). Daily quests, weekly challenges, streaks, badges, milestones. Daily and weekly earn caps. Anti-abuse rules.
snapshot.title: Module 9: Gamification system
